name: InstanceDefinitionArchiveFileStatus
summary: The archive file of a linked instance definition can have the following possible states. Use InstanceObject.ArchiveFileStatus to query a instance definition's archive file status.

enum_values.name: NotALinkedInstanceDefinition
enum_values.summary: The instance definition is not a linked instance definition.

enum_values.name: LinkedFileNotReadable
enum_values.summary: The instance definition's archive file is not readable.

enum_values.name: LinkedFileNotFound
enum_values.summary: The instance definition's archive file cannot be found.

enum_values.name: LinkedFileIsUpToDate
enum_values.summary: The instance definition's archive file is up-to-date.

enum_values.name: LinkedFileIsNewer
enum_values.summary: The instance definition's archive file is newer.

enum_values.name: LinkedFileIsOlder
enum_values.summary: The instance definition's archive file is older.

enum_values.name: LinkedFileIsDifferent
enum_values.summary: The instance definition's archive file is different.
